creator: harry@akima.flintsbach.schmalzbauer.de
text:
I've never had problems with my Prolific USB-Serial converter in the last
years, but I think it's new that it doesn't get recognized with it's real
name any more.  ucom is attaching but doesn't evaluate the vendor.

How-To-Repeat: kldload uplcom and ucom and connect the USB-Serial Converter.  dmesg shows:

ucom0: <vendor 0x067b product 0x2303, class 0/0, rev 1.10/2.02, addr 2> on uhub0
